stemHtml: Consider a medium jet transport aircraft taking off from a contaminated runway where the minimum control speed on the ground (VMCG) is the limiting factor. What could be used to improve the take-off performance in this scenario?

options.a: Reduced take-off thrust to lower V<sub>MCG</sub>
options.b: Reduced take-off thrust to Increase V<sub>MCG</sub>
options.c: Derated take-off thrust to increase V<sub>MCG</sub>
options.d: Derated take-off thrust to lower V<sub>MCG</sub>
